C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\s2n_test_mismatched_curves.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\s2n_test_mismatched_curves.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\s2n_test_mismatched_curves.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\cc.exe -g -flto=auto -fno-fat-lto-objects -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\s2n_test_mismatched_curves.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o bin\s2n_test_mismatched_curves.exe -Wl,--out-implib,lib\libs2n_test_mismatched_curves.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\s2n_test_mismatched_curves.dir\linkLibs.rsp
